text.title: Vector DB Dev Setup — Procedure
text.summary: Four steps: docker-run → install matching client → smoke → record.

step.name: docker-run
step.action: Author docker-compose with pinned tag, mounted volume, port mapping. `docker compose up -d`. Verify container healthy.

step.name: install-client
step.action: `pip install qdrant-client==1.10.0` (matching server major.minor). Pin in pyproject / requirements.

step.name: smoke
step.action: Run `verify-dev.py`: create collection → insert 10 vectors → search → assert non-empty.
step.decision-gate: If smoke fails — debug protocol mismatch before any pipeline code (r4-smoke-test).

step.name: record
step.action: Write `dev-setup.yaml` with db_kind + image_tag + client_version + smoke_passed + data_volume. Add data dir to .gitignore.
